name: Shadow
description: A striking Bengal with a playful personality and beautiful rosette patterns. He loves to climb and explore.

name: Luna
description: A sweet and loyal Golden who loves long walks, playing fetch, and making new friends wherever she goes.

name: Milo
description: An energetic young tabby who enjoys chasing laser pointers and batting at feather wands.

name: Bella
description: A curious beagle with a great nose and a friendly disposition. Always ready for a scent-tracking adventure.

name: Oliver
description: A gentle giant with a fluffy coat and a calm demeanor. He enjoys lounging by the window and soft pets.

name: Daisy
description: A tiny fluffball full of energy and love. She might be small, but she has a big, confident personality.

name: Simba
description: A vocal and affectionate Siamese who loves attention and will happily chat with you all day.

name: Charlie
description: A sturdy bulldog with a heart of gold. His favorite activities include short walks and long afternoon naps.

name: Cleo
description: A quiet and elegant Persian who enjoys lounging in the sun. Requires regular brushing to keep her coat glamorous.

name: Max
description: A smart, loyal, and protective shepherd. Highly trainable and looking for an active family.

name: Misty
description: A shy but incredibly loving Russian Blue with stunning silver-blue fur. Warms up quickly to gentle people.

name: Rocky
description: A goofy and energetic boxer who still thinks he's a lap dog. Loves to play and bounce around in the yard.

name: Nala
description: An active and curious cat who loves climbing to the highest point in the room. Very intelligent and playful.

name: Cooper
description: A classic, loyal Lab who is fantastic with families and kids. He loves swimming and retrieving toys.

name: Coco
description: A sweet, floppy kitten who loves to be held. She has striking blue eyes and a very docile personality.

name: Bruno
description: A strong but gentle giant with a calm demeanor. He is deeply devoted to his people and loves a good belly rub.

name: Zelda
description: A hairless beauty who loves wearing warm sweaters and cuddling under the blankets with her humans.

name: Toby
description: A lively little wiener dog with a big bark and an even bigger heart. Enjoys burrowing in blankets.

name: Sassy
description: A mature, glamorous cat who prefers a quiet home. She appreciates gentle brushing and relaxing on soft cushions.

name: Duke
description: An athletic and alert Doberman who forms incredibly strong bonds. Extremely smart and eager to please.

name: Felix
description: A dapper tuxedo cat who is always dressed to impress. He is very social and loves greeting guests.

name: Maya
description: A vocal and beautiful husky who loves the outdoors. She needs an active owner ready for lots of hiking and running.

name: Garfield
description: A laid-back older gent who mostly wants to nap, eat treats, and keep your lap warm while you watch TV.

name: Kona
description: An independent and spirited Shiba with a fox-like appearance. Loyal but enjoys having her own space.

name: Leo
description: A thick-coated, highly affectionate cat who actually enjoys playing in water. Great with families and other pets.
